title: Երևան-Գdelays-Երdelays արdelays delays delays delays delays delays delays delays delays
content: Yerevan-Gyumri-Yerevan EP2D express electric trains resumed operations with departures from Yerevan every Friday, Saturday, and Sunday at 09:15.

title: Երdelays-Delays-Delays delays delays delays delays delays delays delays delays 15-delays
content: The South Caucasus Railway Yerevan-Batumi-Yerevan express train resumed operations from June 15, departing daily at 15:30 from Yerevan.

title: Հdelays 17-delays delays delays delays Երdelays-Delays-Delays delays delays delays
content: Seasonal suburban electric train from Almast (Yerevan) to Shorzha launched June 17. Operates Fridays, Saturdays, Sundays. Tickets: 600 drams to Sevan, 1000 drams to Shorzha.

title: Ինdelays delays delays Երdelays-Delays delays Delays-Երdelays delays delays delays delays
content: Flights between Yerevan and Kapan operate every Monday and Friday. Departing Yerevan at 08:00 and Kapan at 10:00. Tickets start from 20,000 drams.

title: Russia airspace closed - special flight to Yerevan
content: Russia's airspace was closed but a special repatriation flight to Yerevan was organized. Over 2,000 Armenian citizens were seeking to return home.

title: World media writes about Pegasus use in Armenia
content: World media published articles about cases of phone surveillance of journalists and human rights defenders in Armenia using the Israeli-made Pegasus spyware software.

title: Weather in Armenia
content: Weather report for Armenia. Expected heat of up to +42 degrees due to air masses penetrating from the Sahara.

title: There is no sex in Armenia - Gevorg Babayan #FreeZone
content: Article by Gevorg Babayan in the FreeZone column discussing social issues in Armenia.

title: Italian Honorary Consul in Gyumri awarded by Shirak Governor
content: Italian Honorary Consul in Gyumri Antonio Montalto was awarded a certificate of appreciation by the Shirak Governor. Armenia has expressed political will to sign a peace treaty with Azerbaijan.

title: Reshuffle in General Staff won't cause any problems or threats, says Minister of Defense
content: Armenian Minister of Defense Suren Papikyan stated in parliament that reforms in the military are a necessity and delaying is inadmissible.

title: SpaceX sent tourists to space for the first time - they returned safely
content: SpaceX Crew Dragon capsule successfully landed in the Atlantic Ocean after the Inspiration4 mission, the first spaceflight where none of the participants were professional astronauts.

title: Anti-Corruption Court President's wife did not submit declarations
content: The wife of Anti-Corruption Court President Khachik Ghazaryan has not submitted required declarations to the Corruption Prevention Commission. She claims the reason is technical.

title: Lavrov on returning Nagorno-Karabakh to the negotiating table
content: Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov addressed the issue of returning Nagorno-Karabakh to the negotiating table. The parties themselves should determine the participants of negotiations.

title: Government promotes intensive orchards establishment
content: The Armenian government promotes establishment of intensive orchards through a 2020-2023 development program with accessible lending and partial cost reimbursement.

title: Suspect Donations and Unidentified Sources of the Ruling Civil Contract's Election Campaign Finances
content: Investigation into Civil Contract party election campaign finances. The party did not disclose donor identities. Among 140 donors who contributed 2.5 million AMD, at least 8 were employed by Yeremyan Projects.

title: Free medical care in Artsakh in 2022
content: In Artsakh in 2022, medical assistance for the population will be completely free of charge.

title: USAID to allocate $8.5 million for Nagorno-Karabakh displaced persons
content: USAID plans to allocate approximately 8.5 million dollars for housing needs and psychosocial support for those forcibly displaced from Nagorno-Karabakh.

title: Government responds to Catholicos statement on Kocharyan detention
content: The government responded to the statement by the Catholicos regarding changing Kocharyan's detention measure.

title: Foreign Minister of Armenia Ararat Mirzoyan received the Secretary General of BSEC Lazar Comanescu
content: Armenian FM Ararat Mirzoyan presented the latest developments in regulating Armenia-Azerbaijan relations and emphasized the imperative to unblock the Lachin Corridor without preconditions.

title: Daily News Summary [12.03.2022]
content: Daily news digest covering Armenian affairs including defense, diplomacy, and domestic politics for March 12, 2022.

title: Daily News Digest [29.10.2021]
content: Daily news digest covering Armenian affairs for October 29, 2021.

title: Our goal is to prevent any new concessions at any cost - Ishkhan Saghatelyan
content: Ishkhan Saghatelyan, Vice President of the RA National Assembly, discussed a rally planned for the first ten days of November.

title: Opposition has no final decision yet over nominating candidate for President of Armenia
content: The opposition has not yet made a final decision regarding nominating a candidate for President of Armenia.

title: Deputy PM Mher Grigoryan meets Eurasian Economic Commission Minister Sergey Glazyev
content: Deputy PM Mher Grigoryan met with Eurasian Economic Commission Minister Sergey Glazyev to discuss cooperation within the EAEU framework and strategic programs for Eurasian economic integration through 2025.

title: November 4 power outages across the republic
content: On November 4, there will be power outages across the republic in various regions.

title: Former NSS Director Vanetsyan on share changes - news.am
content: Former NSS Director Artur Vanetsyan commented on the Prime Minister spokesperson statements regarding share changes. The entire history of share changes was done with the PM's direct knowledge.

title: Shirak FC ownership dispute - HFF President statement
content: HFF President Armen Melikbekyan published an open letter to Shirak FC fans, coaches, and players. The current owner is trying to hide his narrow personal interest behind other people.
